infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: DreamLens uses your microphone to record your dream description immediately upon waking, before the memory fades. Recordings are transcribed on-device and not stored.

plugins.microphonePermission: DreamLens uses your microphone to record your dream description immediately upon waking, before the memory fades. Recordings are transcribed on-device and not stored.
plugins.speechRecognitionPermission: DreamLens transcribes your spoken dream on-device so you never have to type in the dark.
